character.name:
Stocky black Taiwanese temple guardian tiger,
  very wide flat bulldog face, small round ears,
  golden king symbol marking on forehead,
  big glowing amber yellow eyes, wide friendly grin showing two front teeth,
  holding ancient gold coin in mouth,
  dark black body with bright gold spiral swirl patterns,
  thick red collar with gold bells,
  red flower ornament on head,
  short chunky legs, powerful guardian pose,
  folk art temple deity style, NOT scary or evil,
  warm gold accent palette on deep black body
